PRODUCTION

S65 — Demo catalogue imported to production (hotel + doctor)

Imported through the live admin Import/Export UI, with a screenshot at every step.

2026-06-11 · hotel.vbwd.cc & doctor.vbwd.cc · upsert mode (no deletions)

Summary

InstanceCategories createdResources createdErrors (cat/res)
hotel.vbwd.cc5150/0
doctor.vbwd.cc12280/0
How. For each instance: log in to the production admin → open Import/Export → upload booking_categories.json (Preview → Confirm) → upload booking_resources.json (Preview → Confirm) → verify in the Resource List. Resources link to their category by category_slugs, resolved on import. Imports ran in upsert mode — existing demo data was left intact. Manifests on both instances were confirmed to expose booking_categories/booking_resources before importing.

Verified live. Public endpoint /api/v1/booking/resources returns the imported rows on both instances (hotel: 15 imported; doctor: 28 imported). Remaining S65 phase: checkout proof (Stripe test card + tokens, with/without coupon).
